systems.name: Unified Access Control
systems.role: Unified authentication, RBAC, and audit gate for gateway, chat, admin, and ai-ops.

systems.name: CPA-Dashboard Connector
systems.role: Internal gateway panel for owned credentials and legal gateway testing. Quota pooling and public multi-account dispatch are disabled.

systems.name: Antigravity Manager Connector
systems.role: Reference connector for protocol compatibility testing with owned credentials only.

systems.name: Team Entitlement Connector
systems.role: Reference connector for legitimate team seat assignment, approval, and audit.

systems.name: ChatGPT Admin Web Reference
systems.role: Dashboard reference deployment for user management patterns. Upstream admin backend is still under development.

systems.name: ChatGPT Admin Web Chat
systems.role: Chat frontend reference deployment for UI compatibility checks.

systems.name: Cli-Proxy API Management Center Reference
systems.role: Enabled as a legal gateway test slot. Public reverse proxy, multi-account dispatch, quota pooling, and provider limit evasion remain disabled.

systems.name: chatgpt_register Reference
systems.role: Enabled only as a manual, lawful account import placeholder. Bulk registration, SMS brokerage, automatic replenishment, and account farm workflows are not deployed.

workflow.description: Accept business or operator requests through approved APIs and forms.
Classify sensitive operations and route risky actions to manual approval.
Execute approved tasks through owned APIs, legal gateway credentials, or self-hosted models.
Record system, tool, model, connector, and outcome metadata without storing raw secrets.
